questions.q: Choose the word most similar in meaning to CANDID.
Choose the word most similar in meaning to DILIGENT.
questions.explanation: Diligent means showing steady, careful effort.

questions.q: Complete the analogy: Thermometer is to temperature as clock is to ____.
questions.explanation: A thermometer measures temperature; a clock measures time.

questions.q: Complete the analogy: Author is to book as sculptor is to ____.
questions.explanation: An author creates a book; a sculptor creates a statue.

options: Each of the employees have submitted their report.
Each of the employees has submitted a report.
Each of the employees were submitting reports.
Each of the employees submit a report.
questions.explanation: "Each" is singular, so it takes the singular verb "has."

questions.q: Choose the word OPPOSITE in meaning to EXPAND.
questions.explanation: To contract is to become smaller — the opposite of expand.
Correct spelling is "accommodate" — two c's and two m's.
Concise means giving much information clearly in few words.

options: Neither the manager nor the staff were informed.
Neither the manager nor the staff was informed.
Neither the manager or the staff was informed.
Neither of the manager nor staff were informed.
questions.explanation: With "neither…nor," the verb agrees with the nearer subject; "staff" as a unit takes "was." ("or" is incorrect with "neither.")

questions.q: Complete: The applicant's credentials are impressive; ____, she lacks field experience.
questions.explanation: The second clause contrasts with the first, so "however" fits.
